fl0m IS a cheater. His mouse is rigged. His mouse knows where his hand is at all times. It knows this because it knows where it isn't. By subtracting where it is from where it isn't, or where it isn't from where it is (whichever is greater), it obtains a difference, or deviation. The gyroscope inside his mouse via accurately calculating the angular momentum simulates a so called "Savant Level Aim" allowing him to click heads.
